_meta.description: Golden caller dataset for direct-caller recall benchmarking
_meta.usage: Run scripts/benchmark/build_caller_oracle.py to regenerate from PyCG + ripgrep
_meta.normalization: Chunk IDs normalized (line ranges stripped via evaluation/metrics.py:normalize_chunk_id)
_meta.format: target_chunk_id → list of expected direct-caller chunk IDs
_meta.baseline_note: Capture baseline with: run_caller_recall.sh run --project-path ... --output results/before.json; compare with: run_caller_recall.sh --compare results/before.json results/after.json
_meta.relevance_scale: All entries in expected_callers are grade=2 (direct caller confirmed by code reading)

queries.description: normalize_chunk_id strips line-range from chunk IDs; called by normalize_chunk_ids, build_chunk_line_lookup, resolve_chunk_ids_to_ranges within same file
_enrich_callers converts RelationshipEntry list to enriched dicts; called only from analyze_impact in same class
calculate_recall_at_k is the core Recall@k metric; called from calculate_metrics_from_results (used for 5 recall variants)
add_call_edge adds a caller→callee edge to the code graph; called from add_chunk (main chunk, findable), populate_from_embeddings, and build_graph_from_chunks (both in split_blocks, structural gap)
get_by_chunk_id does an exact metadata lookup for a chunk; called from multiple enrichment methods in RelationshipAnalyzer
find_enclosing_chunk is called directly from _node_to_raw_chunk_id in external_call_graph — cross-package call from chunking/relationships to evaluation
build_line_to_chunk_map is called from IndexWriteStage._inject_call_edges — cross-package call from search to evaluation (renamed from _inject_pyan_edges in commit 5ac2b7a)
